coupon.source_phrase_block: DCR MA Parks [returnable pass] Parques DCR de Massachusetts [pase retornable] Provides free parking for one vehicle at a Massachusetts State Park. Permite parquear gratis un vehículo. *Returnable passes may be picked up one day in advance and must be returned by 10am the following day.* *Los boletos que son retornables deben recogerse el día antes y devolverse antes de las 10am del próximo dia.*
